violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops with the handles down in the product in the Subway cold hold and the Pizza Hut cold hold.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Top of the dish washer around the edges where the door opens has debris buildup that falls down when the door opens.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Egg salad dated 10/10 needed to be discarded.
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
